tool.title: table (rappture2web)
tool.about:
Example of a Rappture <table> object.
Computes energy levels for a particle in a box (1D quantum well).

about.label: Box size
about.description: Size of the 1D quantum well containing an electron

about.label: Effective mass
about.description: Mass of the electron in a crystal, relative to the normal electron mass m0.
